name: Pyrochroidae
diagnosis: Fire-coloured beetles are the beetles of the Pyrochroidae family, which includes the red cardinal beetles. This family contains some 150 species. Many species in the subfamily Pyrochroinae have comb- or antler-like antennae.

genus_notes.dendroides: Dendroides is a genus of fire-colored beetles in the family Pyrochroidae.
genus_notes.neopyrochroa: Neopyrochroa is a genus of fire-colored beetles in the family Pyrochroidae.
genus_notes.pedilus: Pedilus is a genus of fire-colored beetles in the family Pyrochroidae.
